positive: A vibrant, minimalist illustration featuring a stylized sloth hanging from an exaggerated jungle vine. The sloth is designed with clean, smooth silhouettes and gentle, curved lines. The background should be a flat gradient of complementary tropical colors (teals, emeralds, and lemon yellow). Use a strong, graphic pop-art style with thick black outlines. Composition must be centered, ensuring excellent print visibility on fabric. Focus on a joyful, relaxed mood, emphasizing clean vector art quality.
negative: blurry, noisy, low quality, grainy, watermark, text, signature, logos, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, complex background, photorealistic, oil painting
